message:
fix: address round 5 review issues — subscription leaks, stale handles, race condition

- Unsubscribe from old session events topic in updateSessionId (leak fix)
- Track per-handle result topics and unsubscribe in shutdown/clearHandles
- Add clearHandles() to AgentSpawner for session reset cleanup
- Store spawner subscription promise, await in submitGoal (race fix)
- Call clearHandles() from /clear handler in SessionController
- Fix cli.test.ts mock to include updateSessionId and clearHandles
- Make multi-agent test concurrent with Promise.all
- Add tests: clearHandles, updateSessionId old-topic unsubscribe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
